title: Sizzle-Free Shulkers
description: Adds a new fireproof netherite shulker!
body:
Adds a new Netherite Shulker which can be crafted in a smithing table with an **undyed, regular** shulker box, a netherite upgrade template, and a netherite scrap. 

This shulker box is called a Netherite Shulker, and has all of the functionality of a regular shulker box. It is now immune to burning in fire, soul fire, and lava. 

Enjoy!

Give your feedback in my discord.
